name: create_transformation_flow
description: Skill 6: Create a Transformation Flow (TF_) and target Local Table (TL_) in SAP Datasphere. Reads a source SQL view, excludes granular key columns (BillingDocument and BillingDocumentItem by default), groups by dimension columns (String/Date) and aggregates measures (Decimal/Integer) via SUM. Dry-run by default.

source_view.description: SQL view to aggregate (must start with SV_).

exclude_columns.description: Additional columns to exclude beyond the defaults (BillingDocument, BillingDocumentItem).

deploy.description: Set true to deploy to Datasphere. Requires confirm and acknowledge_ai.

confirm.description: Human confirmation flag. Must be true when deploy=true.

acknowledge_ai.description: AI literacy acknowledgement. Must be true when deploy=true.
